title: Derivative Instruments: A company expects to receive 1 million euros in 6...
summary: Identify the appropriate derivative to hedge against foreign exchange rate risk.
prompt: A company expects to receive 1 million euros in 6 months. What type of derivative contract should it enter to hedge against a potential decrease in the euro's value?

options.text: The company should enter into a forward contract to lock in the current
Difference between spot and futures prices

solution: The company should enter into a forward contract to lock in the current exchange rate and hedge against the euro's potential depreciation. [[24]]
